person.name: Gallery Showcase
person.tagline: Life in frames — outfits, occasions, and quiet moments.

featured.title: Garden Photoshoot Pink Saree
featured.description: A collection from garden photoshoot featuring pink saree.

images.title: Blooming Grace
images.caption: Under a canopy of vibrant bougainvillea, she reaches for the beauty of nature, her delicate saree mirroring the soft petals above. A timeless moment of quiet connection between elegance and the wild blossoms.

images.title: Petals and Poise
images.caption: Amidst the cascade of vibrant bougainvillea, she finds a quiet moment of grace. The soft pink drape catches the sunlight, mirroring the delicate beauty of the blossoms she reaches for.

images.title: Radiance Under the Canopy
images.caption: Draped in the elegance of vibrant silk, she stands as a graceful testament to tradition against the backdrop of a sun-drenched, tranquil garden.
